entry.title: Wardrobe Upgrade
entry.summary:
Author: lovelysim

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,644Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 39

Summary: What if the Nightwing suit was made of a living symbiotic ooze from outer space? In this retelling of the events of Dick getting his new suit, it leads to another part of himself being unlocked. As well as two other Titans members being unwillingly roped into this little adventure of self-discovery, too...

entry.title: A Leap to the Left
entry.summary:
Author: Kishirokitsune

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,552Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 12

Summary: When the Blight first appeared, no one thought much of it. It was a disease, like any other, and with time it would either cease on its own or the scientists of Earth would find a way to stop it from spreading. But then it grew. And it grew. Until a gray sickness covered the planet, slowly choking out life on a once verdant world.That was when Tim Drake came forward with a plan. He gathered his closest allies, consulted the few experts who remained, and told them all that the only way they could save their world and the people who lived there was by going back in time and ensuring the Blight was never able to spread.If only he'd also informed them that they could only do so in a very roundabout way.

entry.title: Bunny caretaking 101
entry.summary:
Author: rainiswriting

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,967Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 96

Summary: Jason rubbed his eyes to make sure he wasn’t hallucinating. He hadn’t had a proper eight hours of sleep in days, but upon reopening them, the black rabbit was still there. It was perched outside his window, using fluffy paws to scratch at the bulletproof glass. Frustrated, the rabbit shifted from aggressive pawing to attempting to bite through the pane. It was, of course, unsuccessful—the window was far too large for its tiny snout. Having been flabbergasted long enough, Jason finally walked over and knelt so he was at eye level with the creature.

entry.title: I'll Build You Back (Somehow)
entry.summary:
Author: WakingNightmares

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,382Chapters: 4/16Kudos: 221

Summary: Jason gives him an exasperated look as they get to the front door. “Seriously, Dick. I’m fine. Promise. I’ve had a helluva lot worse than this, and still managed a patrol, with a lot less sleep than this. I’ll take it easy, keep the ass-kickin’ to a minimum tonight, alright?” He says with a grin. And fuck the things Dick would do for that grin. It erases the hard edges, the cold and calculating Red Hood, leaving behind a mischievous looking young man, rather than a younger version of Bruce. So he sighs. “Fine. Just call me if you need anything, okay? I’m gonna be in town for a few days anyways, until we get this Two-Face thing figured out, so it’s not like it’s out of my way,” Dick says as he steps outside into the driveway. “Besides, it’d be nice to hang out more often.” Jason gives Dick an unsure look, and for a moment, Dick can feel his heart sink a bit. Did Jason not enjoy their breakfast? Dick had intruded, to be fair, but Jason had seemed to enjoy - “Yeah? You wanna hang?”

entry.title: red at the bone
entry.summary:
Author: badalice

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 40,127Chapters: 4/9Kudos: 48

Summary: Under the aegis of the Order of St. George, the House of Wayne has silently protected the children of Gotham from the monsters that stalk them for nearly two decades. Its members live dangerous, lonely lives, guardians of a secret that the Order will kill to keep safe. When Dick Grayson's estranged brother Jason Todd resurfaces in small town Kansas, on the trail of one of the most dangerous types of monsters the Order hunts and kills, House Dragon Bruce Wayne sends Dick to assist—and, just maybe, to bring Jason back into the fold. Some wounds, though, run too deep, and some promises lie too broken, and Dick knows all too well the welcome that he'll receive if he goes—but when it comes to Jason, he'll do whatever it takes.

entry.summary:
Author: parkerwritesfic

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,715Chapters: 6/6Kudos: 96

entry.title: Pinned Butterfly
entry.summary:
Author: sarriathmg

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,409Chapters: 6/18Kudos: 343

Summary: Renegade was suave, dangerous, and inevitable. He was everything she feared but was inexorably drawn to. He was also the former Robin, Jason's predecessor, breaking off his path with Batman and the Teen Titans to pursue a life as a mercenary with Deathstroke as his mentor. For months, Jason had dallied and exchanged flirty quips with the villain on the field. But that had all been games. When Jason saw something she shouldn't have one night, she suddenly found herself Renegade's—Dick Grayson's—prisoner. aka. Like the story Renegade but with Jason having always been a girl.

entry.summary:
Author: CallmeSSS

entry.title: You are precious to me.
entry.summary:
Author: Nyx_dreamy

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 164,836Chapters: 61/?Kudos: 365

Summary: Damian had been sexually assaulted and after that his father saw the video, he just want to run away. That is how he end up living with Dick. Dick is conflicated about his feelings for Jason. Damian is now under his care and him and Bruce are still awkward around each other. And something is up with Tim but he doesn't know what. Jason is waiting for Dick to give him a proper answer. His hate for Bruce is too strong and he do not feel welcome in their perfect little family. or Everyone is dealing with things and their family is slowly falling appart. Would they succeed to all get along and get over the mistakes of the past?

entry.title: no light, no light
entry.summary:
Author: pigeonegg

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,521Chapters: 6/10Kudos: 274

Summary: Jason falls asleep trying not to desperately inhale the faint scent of Dick’s cologne, trying not to play the words honey and sweetheart over and over in his head, trying not to think of Dick, shirtless in the bathroom, rolling his eyes and walking out without saying a word.He tries an awful lot and fails anyway.This is where it starts: the slamming of a bedroom door. entry.title: glasses
entry.summary:
Author: thearkhamknightmare

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,111Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 65

Summary: He takes a seat on the couch once he sorts out the recycling, Dick climbing into his lap when he notices. Jason takes one good look at Dick, gets one good glimpse of his face, and notices a pair of black square frames right smack dab in the center. They accentuated his features in a way that made Jason's brain short circuit because he'd never seen Dick in glasses. In a domino mask, sure, but that wasn't nearly the same. Jason hums, "Are they new?" "No, I just don't wear them all that much," Dick replies, "They're just for reading. Not actual like…corrective lenses." Dick makes a motion to take them off, but Jason shakes his head. "Those glasses look nice," Jason says, casually.or: prompt number one - I didn't know you wore glasses and I'm thinking normal thoughts about you right now, I swear.
